seo.meta_description: See how Acme Platform meets the needs of large-scale enterprise content operations.

hero.headline: Content infrastructure for the enterprise
hero.sub_headline: SSO, audit logs, SLA-backed uptime, and multi-region data residency — all built in, not bolted on.

feature_grid.heading: Enterprise-grade by default
feature_grid.subheading: Security and compliance features that satisfy InfoSec teams without slowing down content teams.

features.title: SSO & SCIM Provisioning
features.description: SAML 2.0 and OIDC single sign-on with automatic user provisioning and de-provisioning via SCIM.

features.title: Audit Trail
features.description: Complete, immutable log of every content change, publish event, and permission modification.

features.title: Data Residency
features.description: Choose where your content data lives — US, EU, or APAC — to meet regional compliance requirements.

features.title: 99.99% SLA
features.description: Backed by a financially-guaranteed uptime SLA with dedicated incident response.

cta_banner.heading: Let's talk about your requirements
cta_banner.body_text: Our solutions engineers will work with your team to design a content architecture that fits your scale.
